findings.description: In the downward-facing image, there is visible road surface degradation with an irregular depression area where asphalt appears to be missing or severely deteriorated. The transition between the darker worn asphalt on the left and the lighter exposed base material on the right edge shows clear deterioration with uneven edges indicating material loss.

In the North-facing image, there is a visible pothole in the center-right of the frame, approximately 2-3 meters ahead of the camera position. The hole shows a darker depression with irregular edges where asphalt has broken away, exposing a slightly different colored base material. The surrounding pavement shows patching work (darker rectangular repair area) but the pothole itself is a distinct depression separate from the patch.

In Image 1 (North view), there is a visible rectangular depression/hole in the road surface on the right side near the drainage opening. The hole shows exposed darker material with broken edges where asphalt has broken away, located adjacent to an open drainage channel. The damage appears to be where road surface has collapsed or broken near the drainage infrastructure.
